channel.title: Monitoring on Hyden's Dev Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Monitoring on Hyden's Dev Blog

item.title: Application Monitoring
item.description: the process of monitoring an application’s performance, availability, and end-user experience to ensure the application is functioning properly

item.title: Infrastructure Monitoring
item.description: used to collect health and performance data from servers, virtual machines, containers, databases, and other backend components in a tech stack.
